name: reviewed-data-pipeline-profile
_comment: Reviewed BCM usage evidence for the governed AWS data pipeline. Replace usageAccountId with YOUR account, and replace the amounts with YOUR reviewed monthly quantities. Every field below is catalog-backed (no placeholders), so it passes validate_usage and is ready for: python core/bcm_pricing_calculator.py run --report-dir <dir> --usage-profile <this file>. serviceCode/usageType/operation must match the AWS Price List catalog for your region.
